style_effects: Constant static sparks crackle in vibrant electric blue and white, drifting erratically like tiny lightning bolts around Venusaur's body. A pulsing electromagnetic aura glows with intense cyan light, distorting the air with subtle heat-haze ripples, while its eyes and tail emit sharp, rhythmic pulses of bright yellow-white light. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
